q: Do you like the area where you live?
examiner_note: Đây là câu hỏi về môi trường sống (Living environment). Bạn nên nêu ra các ưu điểm (pros) và nhược điểm (cons) của khu vực mình sống. Hãy đề cập đến các tiện ích xung quanh (amenities), sự thuận tiện (convenience), và bầu không khí (atmosphere). Sử dụng các cụm từ như 'vibrant neighborhood', 'within walking distance', 'commuter-friendly' sẽ làm câu trả lời ấn tượng hơn.

band7.text: Yes, I really like my neighborhood. It's quite peaceful and safe, and there are many parks where I can go for a walk. Also, it's very convenient because there are several supermarkets and cafes nearby, so I don't have to travel far for my daily needs.
band7.note: Trả lời trực tiếp, nêu được lý do tại sao thích (peaceful, safe, convenient). Sử dụng từ vựng tự nhiên.

band8.text: Overall, I’m very fond of the area I reside in. It’s a vibrant and friendly neighborhood with a great sense of community. One of the best things is that most amenities are within walking distance, which makes my life much easier. However, the traffic congestion during peak hours can be a bit frustrating sometimes.
band8.note: Sử dụng từ vựng nâng cao (reside in, vibrant, sense of community, amenities, within walking distance, traffic congestion, peak hours). Cách dẫn đạt mạch lạc.

band9.text: Absolutely, I find my local vicinity to be exceptionally charming and well-appointed. It strikes a perfect balance between urban convenience and a tranquil residential atmosphere. I particularly appreciate the architectural diversity and the abundance of green spaces, which contribute to a high quality of life. Furthermore, being in such a central, well-connected location significantly reduces my daily commute times. It’s truly an ideal place to call home.
band9.note: Sử dụng vốn từ vựng cực kỳ phong phú và học thuật (vicinity, well-appointed, strikes a balance, architectural diversity, abundance, well-connected, significantly). Cách lập luận vô cùng tinh tế và thuyết phục.

v.meaning: vùng lân cận/khu phố xung quanh
v.example: There are several excellent restaurants in the local vicinity.

v.meaning: được trang bị tốt/đầy đủ tiện nghi
v.example: The apartment is well-appointed with modern appliances and furniture.
It's hard to strike a balance between work and family life.

v.meaning: bầu không khí khu dân cư yên tĩnh
v.example: I love the tranquil residential atmosphere of my neighborhood at night.

v.meaning: sự đa dạng về kiến trúc
v.example: The city is famous for its architectural diversity, from gothic to modern.

v.meaning: sự phong phú của các không gian xanh
v.example: The new town was designed with an abundance of green spaces for residents.
Access to clean water and healthcare is essential for a good quality of life.
The area is well-connected to the city center by several bus lines.

v.meaning: đáng kể/một cách có ý nghĩa
v.example: The price of fuel has increased significantly over the last month.

v.meaning: khu phố sôi động/đầy sức sống
v.example: She moved to a vibrant neighborhood full of artists and musicians.

v.meaning: trong khoảng cách đi bộ được
v.example: The elementary school is within walking distance of our house.
It's so frustrating when your computer crashes and you lose work.
The public transport is usually very crowded during peak hours.
The hotel has excellent amenities, including a 24-hour gym.
We have a strong sense of community in our small village.
The royal family resides in the palace during the winter months.

v.meaning: thuận tiện cho việc đi lại
v.example: The new subway line makes the suburb much more commuter-friendly.
Families with children often look for areas with a low crime rate.

v.meaning: khả năng chi trả/giá cả phải chăng
v.example: Housing affordability is a major concern for young people today.

v.meaning: sự cải thiện khu phố (đi kèm giá cả tăng)
v.example: Gentrification has transformed the old harbor area into a luxury district.

v.meaning: mạng lưới giao thông công cộng
v.example: London has an extensive and reliable public transport network.
I usually go to the local supermarket on Saturday morning.
There is a small health clinic at the end of the street.

v.meaning: cơ sở vật chất giải trí (công viên, bể bơi...)
v.example: The park provides excellent recreational facilities for all ages.
Living near an industrial zone can mean more noise and pollution.
Our house is located in a quiet residential area.
The city center is the main commercial hub of the region.

v.meaning: sự mở rộng đô thị (thường theo nghĩa tiêu cực)
v.example: Urban sprawl is destroying much of the local countryside.
The metropolitan area has a population of over five million.
The cafe has a very cozy atmosphere with soft music and dim lights.
New York is famous for its bustling streets that never sleep.
The apartment on the 10th floor has some scenic views of the park.
The old town has kept its historic charm despite the new buildings.
Air pollution is a serious health risk in many large cities.
Constant traffic noise can be very stressful for residents.
He was fined for littering in the national park.
Overcrowding is a major issue in the city’s schools.

v.meaning: khu vực dành cho người đi bộ
v.example: The downtown has a large pedestrian area with many shops.
More cycle paths are needed to encourage sustainable transport.
Finding a parking space in the city center is almost impossible.
The city is famous for its vibrant and diverse nightlife.

v.meaning: địa danh địa phương nổi bật
v.example: The old clock tower is a famous local landmark.
The neighborhood’s diversity is reflected in its many ethnic restaurants.

v.meaning: thuộc về thế giới/đa văn hóa
v.example: The city has a very cosmopolitan and open-minded feel.
The hotel room was small but very clean and homely.

v.meaning: khu vực đang phát triển/đang lên
v.example: We decided to buy a house in an up-and-coming area to save money.
They live in a secluded cottage in the middle of the woods.
The suburbs offer a quieter life and more space for families.

v.meaning: nơi hẻo lánh/đồng không mông quạnh
v.example: Our car broke down in the middle of nowhere, miles from any town.
The small village is nestled among high mountains.
